narrative: Escalating Iran-Strait of Hormuz conflict risks dominate the weekend tape, setting up a crude-led bid for the Tokyo open after WTI surged 11% on Friday. Fed on hold at 3.75%. USD/JPY closed Friday at 162.35; while safe-haven USD demand is likely to support the pair, the bull flattener yield curve and JPY's positive CESI (+8) suggest potential for JPY outperformance if risk contagion deepens.
